title: OREGON INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE - 211info
text: BEND OREGON INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with information about questions regarding adjustments to tax accounts, IRS notifications, tax payment plans, levies on wages or bank accounts, other tax-related issues, and consumer fraud. 250 NW Franklin Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4:30pm; closed on federal holidays. Email (844) 545-5640 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (844) 545-5640 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information; call for appointment for in-person services. No walk-in asssistance. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, tax ID number or social security number LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties Services: Consumer Fraud Reporting Federal Income Tax Information Local Income Tax Information State Income Tax Information Tax Collection Agencies Tax Forms If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEND
